name: Scott Kelly
summary: Retired NASA astronaut and former U.S. Navy aviator who served on NASA's UAP Independent Study Team.
profileSummary: Retired NASA astronaut and former U.S. Navy aviator who served on NASA's UAP Independent Study Team.
background: Retired NASA astronaut, engineer, and former U.S. Navy captain and test pilot.
inclusionNote: Included because NASA formally appointed him to the UAP Independent Study Team, adding operational aviation and astronaut experience to the panel.
